# gicons — Full Documentation

> Open-source brand logo icons for React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Web Components, and raw SVG.

## Overview

gicons is a monorepo that provides brand logos (Stripe, Google, GitHub, etc.) as typed, tree-shakeable components for every major frontend framework. Icons are optimized SVGs wrapped in framework-native components.

---

## Packages

| Package | Framework | Peer Dependencies |
|---------|-----------|-------------------|
| `@gicons/react` | React 18+ | `react`, `react-dom` |
| `@gicons/vue` | Vue 3.3+ | `vue` |
| `@gicons/svelte` | Svelte 4+ | `svelte` |
| `@gicons/angular` | Angular 17+ | `@angular/core` |
| `@gicons/web` | Web Components | None |
| `@gicons/svg` | Raw SVG files | None |

## Installation

### React
```
npm install @gicons/react
pnpm add @gicons/react
yarn add @gicons/react
bun add @gicons/react
```

### Vue
```
npm install @gicons/vue
pnpm add @gicons/vue
yarn add @gicons/vue
bun add @gicons/vue
```

### Svelte
```
npm install @gicons/svelte
pnpm add @gicons/svelte
yarn add @gicons/svelte
bun add @gicons/svelte
```

### Angular
```
npm install @gicons/angular
pnpm add @gicons/angular
yarn add @gicons/angular
bun add @gicons/angular
```

### Web Components
```
npm install @gicons/web
pnpm add @gicons/web
yarn add @gicons/web
bun add @gicons/web
```

### Raw SVG
```
npm install @gicons/svg
pnpm add @gicons/svg
yarn add @gicons/svg
bun add @gicons/svg
```

---

## Usage Examples

### React
```jsx
import { StripeWordmarkBlurple } from '@gicons/react';

function App() {
  return <StripeWordmarkBlurple size={32} className="my-icon" />;
}
```

Props: `size` (number | string), `width`, `height`, plus all standard SVG props (`className`, `style`, `aria-label`, `onClick`, etc.). Components use `forwardRef`.

### Vue
```vue
<script setup>
import { StripeWordmarkBlurple } from '@gicons/vue';
</script>

<template>
  <StripeWordmarkBlurple :size="32" class="my-icon" />
</template>
```

Props: `size` (number | string, default 24), `width`, `height`. Passes through `$attrs`.

### Svelte
```svelte
<script>
  import { StripeWordmarkBlurple } from '@gicons/svelte';
</script>

<StripeWordmarkBlurple size={32} class="my-icon" />
```

Props: `size` (number | string, default 24), `width`, `height`. Passes through `$$restProps`.

### Angular
```typescript
import { StripeWordmarkBlurple } from '@gicons/angular';

@Component({
  imports: [StripeWordmarkBlurple],
  template: `<gicon-stripe-wordmark-blurple size="32" />`,
})
export class MyComponent {}
```

Selector pattern: `gicon-{brand}-{type}-{variant}`. Props: `size`, `width`, `height`.

### Web Components
```html
<script type="module">
  import '@gicons/web';
</script>

<gicon-stripe-wordmark-blurple size="32"></gicon-stripe-wordmark-blurple>
```

Tag pattern: `gicon-{brand}-{type}-{variant}`. Attributes: `size`, `width`, `height`.

### Raw SVG
```javascript
// Import optimized SVG files directly
import stripeSvg from '@gicons/svg/brands/stripe/wordmark-blurple.svg';
```

---

## Naming Convention

Component names are generated from the brand slug and SVG filename:

**Pattern:** `{BrandPascalCase}{TypePascalCase}{VariantPascalCase}`

**Examples:**
- `stripe/wordmark-blurple.svg` → `StripeWordmarkBlurple`
- `stripe/wordmark-slate.svg` → `StripeWordmarkSlate`
- `stripe/wordmark-white.svg` → `StripeWordmarkWhite`
- `github/mark-dark.svg` → `GithubMarkDark`
- `google/logo-color.svg` → `GoogleLogoColor`

**Web Component/Angular selectors** use kebab-case with `gicon-` prefix:
- `gicon-stripe-wordmark-blurple`
- `gicon-github-mark-dark`

---

## API Endpoint

### GET /api/icons

Returns the full icon catalog as JSON.

**Response shape:**
```json
{
  "brands": [
    {
      "name": "Stripe",
      "slug": "stripe",
      "category": "payments",
      "tags": ["payments", "fintech", "saas", "billing"],
      "website": "https://stripe.com",
      "colors": {
        "primary": "#635BFF",
        "secondary": "#0A2540"
      },
      "variants": [
        {
          "file": "wordmark-blurple.svg",
          "type": "wordmark",
          "variant": "blurple",
          "background": "light",
          "componentName": "StripeWordmarkBlurple",
          "tagName": "stripe-wordmark-blurple"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "count": 1,
  "packages": {
    "react": "@gicons/react",
    "vue": "@gicons/vue",
    "svelte": "@gicons/svelte",
    "angular": "@gicons/angular",
    "web": "@gicons/web",
    "svg": "@gicons/svg"
  },
  "install": {
    "npm": "npm install @gicons/{framework}",
    "pnpm": "pnpm add @gicons/{framework}",
    "yarn": "yarn add @gicons/{framework}",
    "bun": "bun add @gicons/{framework}"
  }
}
```

**Fields:**
- `brands[].slug` — URL-safe identifier, used in `/icons/{slug}` pages
- `brands[].category` — One of: payments, social, devtools, cloud, design, communication, productivity, other
- `brands[].variants[].type` — One of: logo, wordmark, mark, icon
- `brands[].variants[].background` — Recommended background: "light" or "dark"
- `brands[].variants[].componentName` — PascalCase name for React/Vue/Svelte/Angular imports
- `brands[].variants[].tagName` — kebab-case name for Web Component/Angular selectors (prefix with `gicon-`)

---

## Website Pages

### Homepage `/`
- Displays all brand icons in a searchable, filterable grid
- Search matches brand name, category, and tags
- Filter by category (payments, social, devtools, etc.)

### Brand Detail `/icons/{slug}`
- Shows all variants of a brand logo
- Code snippets for every framework with copy button
- SVG download for each variant
- Variants displayed on appropriate light/dark backgrounds

---

## Contributing a New Brand

To add a new brand, create a directory in `packages/svg/src/brands/{brand-slug}/` with:

1. SVG files named `{type}-{variant}.svg` (e.g., `logo-color.svg`, `wordmark-white.svg`)
2. A `meta.json` file:

```json
{
  "name": "Brand Name",
  "slug": "brand-name",
  "category": "category",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2"],
  "website": "https://brand.com",
  "colors": {
    "primary": "#000000",
    "secondary": "#ffffff"
  },
  "license": "trademark",
  "variants": [
    {
      "file": "logo-color.svg",
      "type": "logo",
      "variant": "color",
      "background": "light"
    }
  ]
}
```

**SVG requirements:**
- Must have a `viewBox` attribute
- No hardcoded `width`/`height`
- No external CSS or fonts
- Pure vector (no embedded raster images)

Run `pnpm build` to generate all framework components automatically.

---

- Repository: https://github.com/gicons/gicons
- License: MIT (code), Trademarks (brand logos belong to their respective owners)
- Website: https://gicons.dev
